strategic_objective: Elucidate the causes and stability of the zero entropy distribution in DDoS destination ports and its potential as a representation-sensitive detection signal.
key_checks: Determine if zero entropy reflects targeted attack or dataset artifact
Examine temporal and contextual factors affecting port distribution shifts
Assess potential for this feature to serve as a strong localized representation-sensitive handle
success_criteria: Evidence clarifying whether port distribution is attack-driven or artifact
Identification of temporal/contextual influences on distribution shifts
Assessment of feature’s robustness and risk of shortcut exploitation
